surface_styles.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] p-6 rounded-none shadow-none hover:border-[#111111] transition-colors duration-200
surface_styles.ai_summary_card: bg-[#F5F5F5] border border-[#111111] p-6 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111111]
surface_styles.header: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5E5] sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-white px-6 py-2.5 font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none border-2 border-[#111111] hover:bg-white hover:text-[#111111] transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111111] px-6 py-2.5 font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none border-2 border-[#E5E5E5] hover:border-[#111111] transition-all duration-200
buttons.accent: bg-[#FF331F] text-white px-6 py-2.5 font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none border-2 border-[#FF331F] hover:bg-white hover:text-[#FF331F] transition-all duration-200

inputs.default: border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-none px-4 py-2.5 w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-[#111111] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#111111] text-[#111111] bg-white transition-all duration-200

charts.style: Minimalist, no rounded corners on bars, grid lines should be extremely light (#E5E5E5) or hidden, tooltip should have a solid black background.

modals.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-none shadow-[8px_8px_0_0_#111111] p-8

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border color changes and background inversions for buttons. Use duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast 2px rings focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#111111] focus:ring-offset-2
motion_and_interactions.loading: ASCII art loader or simple harsh blinking block instead of typical spinner for the Swiss/Brutalist feel.

images.description: Elegant black and white photo of a man in glasses and suit. Used for user profile/avatar placeholders.
Caffeinery store facade. Used as a placeholder for the local business entity.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: APCA contrast standards applied. Text colors on interactive elements clearly specified.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, inputs, and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Do not use rounded borders anywhere (rounded-none).
Include font links from Fontshare in the main HTML file or via CSS import.
Ensure all components (sidebar, layout grids, cards) use solid borders with sharp contrasting edges instead of soft shadows.
The AI Summary placeholder should visually stand out. Use the ai_summary_card style (solid black border and solid shadow offset).
Use Phosphor icons with duotone weight to add subtle character without breaking the strict minimalist vibe.
Install chart.js and react-chartjs-2 for the Sentiment charts. Configure them to be sharp, minimal, and devoid of unnecessary chart junk.
Do not use transparent header backgrounds without blur. Keep it readable.
Remember to add data-testid to every interactive component (button, links, form inputs) for testing purposes.
